title: Book Review: Medicalized Motherhood: Perspectives from the Lives of African-American and Jewish Women. By Jacquelyn S. Litt. New Brunswick, NJ: Rutgers University Press, 2000, 189 pp., $50.00 (cloth), $20.00 (paper); Mothering Inner-City Children: The Early School Years. By Katherine Brown Rosier. New Brunswick, NJ: Rutgers University Press, 2000, 301 pp., $52.00 (cloth), $22.00 (paper); Mothers and Children: Feminist Analyses and Personal Narratives. Edited by Susan E. Chase and Mary F. Rogers. New Brunswick, NJ: Rutgers University Press, 2001, 343 pp., $55.00 (cloth), $25.00 (paper).
